title: MarkOS Pack Manifest
description: Schema for lib/markos/packs/*.pack.json manifest files. Validated by Ajv v8 with strict:false.

slug.description: Canonical identifier. Lowercase alphanumeric and internal hyphens only. Used as map key and file name prefix. Pattern prevents path traversal.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the operator override UI

type.description: base = business-model family pack; overlay = industry overlay pack (Phase 108+)

aliases.description: All alias strings that resolve to this pack via normalizeBusinessModel()

industries.description: Industry slugs this pack is broadly relevant to (empty for generic base packs)

completeness.description: Per-discipline completeness. Values: full=production-ready; partial=some assets exist; stub=placeholder only; missing=not started

baseDoc.description: Relative repo path to the tone+naturality literacy document for this pack

proofDoc.description: Relative repo path to the proof-posture literacy document for this pack

overlayDoc.description: Relative repo path to the business-model-level overlay document, or null if none

skeletonDir.description: Relative repo path to the skeleton template directory for this pack, or null if none yet

fallbackAllowed.description: Whether the system may fall back to this pack when a more specific one is unavailable

overlayFor.description: For overlay packs: array of base pack slugs this overlay applies to. null for base packs.

dependencies.description: Slugs of other packs that must be loaded before this one

operatorNotes.description: Human-readable notes displayed in the operator override approval step

changelog.description: Schema version history. At least one entry required.
